emergencyInfo.notes: ESTA must be printed/saved. Health insurance policy number: US-992-1082-A (Allianz Travel).

steps.title: Departure & Arrival in San Francisco
steps.description: Flight from Paris CDG to San Francisco SFO. Pick up rental car and check in to the hotel.

items.title: Flight AF084 (CDG to SFO)
items.details: Terminal 2E, CDG Airport. Duration: 11h 30m.

items.title: Hertz Car Rental Pick-up
items.details: SFO Car Rental Center. Confirmation: #HZ-88291-SF. Large SUV booked.

items.title: Hotel Riu Plaza Fisherman's Wharf
items.details: 2500 Mason St, San Francisco, CA 94133

steps.title: Exploring the City by the Bay
steps.description: Cable car ride, visit to Alcatraz Island, and a walk across the Golden Gate Bridge.

items.title: Alcatraz Day Tour
items.details: Pier 33 Alcatraz Landing. Be there 30 mins early.

items.title: Powell-Hyde Cable Car Ride
items.details: Board at Hyde & Beach Sts. Single rides can be bought on MuniMobile app.

steps.title: Drive to Yosemite Valley
steps.description: Drive from SF to Yosemite National Park (~4 hours). Stop at Oakdale for groceries.

items.title: Yosemite National Park Entry Reservation
items.details: Reservation required for peak hours entry (6 AM - 4 PM). Confirmation: #YOS-99120.

items.title: Yosemite Valley Lodge Check-in
items.details: 9006 Yosemite Lodge Dr, Yosemite National Park, CA 95389

steps.title: Conquering Half Dome
steps.description: An epic day hike to Half Dome. Very demanding (~14-16 hours, 17 miles). Early start at 5:00 AM required.

items.title: Half Dome Cables Permit Check
items.details: Rangers will check permits at the base of Sub Dome.

steps.title: Yosemite to Monterey & Pacific Highway
steps.description: Drive from Yosemite to Monterey (~3.5 hours). Walk around Cannery Row and Fisherman's Wharf.

items.title: The Monterey Hotel
items.details: 407 Calle Principal, Monterey, CA 93940

items.title: Sunset Whale Watching Cruise
items.details: Monterey Bay Whale Watch (84 Fisherman's Wharf). Warm clothes recommended.

steps.title: Big Sur Drive & Santa Barbara
steps.description: Drive the famous Highway 1 through Big Sur. Stop at Bixby Creek Bridge, McWay Falls, and Hearst Castle, then arrive in Santa Barbara.

items.title: Brisas Del Mar, Inn at the Beach
items.details: 223 Castillo St, Santa Barbara, CA 93101

steps.title: Santa Barbara to Los Angeles
steps.description: Morning in Santa Barbara, then drive to LA (~2 hours). Visit Santa Monica Pier and Venice Beach in the evening.

items.title: Loews Santa Monica Beach Hotel
items.details: 1700 Ocean Ave, Santa Monica, CA 90401

steps.title: Universal Studios Hollywood
steps.description: Full day at Universal Studios Hollywood, exploring Super Nintendo World and the Studio Tour.

items.title: Universal Studios 1-Day Express Pass
items.details: Express Pass included for all rides. Gates open at 9 AM.

steps.title: Hollywood & Observatory Sunset
steps.description: Walk of Fame in the morning, hike to Hollywood Sign at noon, sunset and planetarium show at Griffith Observatory.

items.title: Griffith Planetarium Ticket Reservation
items.details: Samuel Oschin Planetarium. Tickets purchased at the desk, but reservation confirmed.

steps.title: LA to Las Vegas via Death Valley
steps.description: Long drive through Death Valley National Park (~5.5 hours driving time). Stop at Badwater Basin and Zabriskie Point. Arrive on the Vegas Strip.

items.title: The Cosmopolitan of Las Vegas
items.details: 3708 Las Vegas Blvd S, Las Vegas, NV 89109 (Terrace Studio Fountain View rooms)

steps.title: Grand Canyon Helicopter Tour
steps.description: Fly over Lake Mead, Hoover Dam, and land inside the Grand Canyon for champagne.

items.title: Maverick Wind Dancer Helicopter Tour
items.details: Shuttle picks up from Cosmopolitan at 12:00 PM. Bring passports!

steps.title: Vegas Strip & O by Cirque du Soleil
steps.description: Relax at the pool, explore other casinos, and see the world-famous water show 'O' at the Bellagio.

items.title: Cirque du Soleil: 'O' Show Tickets
items.details: Bellagio Theater. Category 1 Seats (Section 103, Row G).

steps.title: Vegas to Zion National Park
steps.description: Drive from Vegas to Springdale / Zion National Park (~3 hours). Hike the Riverside Walk in the afternoon.

items.title: Cliffrose Springdale, Curio Collection
items.details: 281 Zion Park Blvd, Springdale, UT 84767 (right outside park gates)

steps.title: Zion: Angels Landing Hike
steps.description: Hike the iconic Angels Landing. Permits are required for the chain section.

items.title: Angels Landing Seasonal Permit
items.details: Rangers will verify permits at Scout Lookout. Must start before 12 PM.

steps.title: Zion to Bryce Canyon
steps.description: Drive via the Zion-Mount Carmel Highway (~2 hours). See the hoodoos from Sunrise Point and Navajo Loop.

items.title: The Lodge at Bryce Canyon
items.details: Bryce Canyon National Park, UT 84764

steps.title: Bryce to Monument Valley
steps.description: Drive to Monument Valley (~4.5 hours). Run the 17-mile scenic drive loop and enjoy the sunset from the balcony.

items.title: The View Hotel Monument Valley
items.details: Indian Rte 42, Oljato-Monument Valley, UT 84536 (Premium Cabin rooms)

steps.title: Monument Valley to Page & Antelope Canyon
steps.description: Drive to Page (~2 hours). Guided tour of Lower Antelope Canyon, then sunset at Horseshoe Bend.

items.title: Lower Antelope Canyon Tour (Ken's Tours)
items.details: Arrive 30 minutes early. No bags allowed inside. Confirmation: #KT-99210.

items.title: Hyatt Place Page Lake Powell
items.details: 1126 N Highway 89, Page, AZ 86040

steps.title: Page to Grand Canyon South Rim
steps.description: Drive from Page to Grand Canyon (~2.5 hours). Walk the Rim Trail and catch sunset at Mather Point.

items.title: El Tovar Hotel
items.details: 9 Village Loop Drive, Grand Canyon Village, AZ 86023

steps.title: Hiking the Bright Angel Trail
steps.description: Hike into the canyon on Bright Angel Trail. Recommend hiking to Indian Garden (~9 miles roundtrip). Start at 6:00 AM to avoid midday heat.

items.title: Grand Canyon Hiking Safe Guide
items.details: Carry at least 3 liters of water per person. Eat salty snacks.

steps.title: Grand Canyon to Phoenix & Departure
steps.description: Drive from Grand Canyon to Phoenix (~3.5 hours). Return rental car and board flight to Paris CDG.

items.title: Flight AF083 (PHX to CDG)
items.details: Phoenix Sky Harbor Terminal 4. Overnight flight, arrival next day.

steps.title: Home Sweet Home
steps.description: Landing in Paris CDG at 2:15 PM local time.
